name: @commonplace/theorem-acp
description: Theorem ACP and Harness identity modules extracted from apps/web (HANDOFF-CONSOLE-ROUND-2 R2.2, porting by extraction): identity policy, agent state reducer, local and hosted ACP clients, session manager, and the bridge command surface. Pure logic, zero CSS, zero framework imports.

scripts.check: npx --yes -p typescript@5.7.3 tsc --noEmit && npx --yes tsx@4.23.0 --test src/state.test.ts
